title: Japanese Coconut Cream Dessert
description: A rich and creamy dessert that combines the flavors of Japan with the sweetness of coconut.
instructions: 1. Open the can of coconut cream and scoop out the thick cream that has risen to the top.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the shredded coconut and sugar.
3. Add the vanilla extract to the coconut mixture and stir to combine.
4. Fold the coconut mixture into the coconut cream until well combined.
5. Spoon the mixture into individual bowls.
6. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
